page_content: ECON499 Independent Research in Economics (1-3 Credits) Directed research under the supervision of a faculty member. Contact department for additional information. Prerequisite: 1 course with a minimum grade of C- from (ECON230, ECON321, BMGT230, STAT400); and 1 course with a minimum grade of C- from (ECON305, ECON325); and 1 course with a minimum grade of C- from (ECON306, ECON326); and minimum of 3 credits from ECON400-499 course range. Restriction: Permission of BSOS-Economics department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
